items.heading: Heading
items.paragraph:
Meet Robin - your new AI assistant, available 24/7, right from your desktop.

Whether you need to reset a password, find information, or get help with a process, Robin is here to handle it in seconds - no waiting, no back-and-forth.

In this guide:
You'll get to know Robin
Understand how AI works and how to use it safely
See it in action with real examples from your day-to-day work
Let's start with a quick introduction - who Robin is and what he can do for you.

items.title: CONTINUE
items.completeHint: Complete the content above before moving on.

items.heading: Heading
items.paragraph:
Before we dive in, we want to make sure

you feel confident with AI.

Here are 3 short clips that answer the most common questions.

embed.title: What is Robin? And why agentic AI is nothing to fear

items.title: CONTINUE

items.heading: Heading
items.paragraph:
Now that you know what agentic AI can do - it's natural to wonder:

Can I trust Robin?

Here's the answer.

items.heading: Heading
items.paragraph:
Feeling good about it? Great.

Now let's look at how to talk to Robin so you get the best results.

embed.title: How to ask Robin the right way

items.title: CONTINUE
items.completeHint: Complete the content above before moving on.

items.heading: Heading
items.paragraph:
You've got the foundation.

Now let's see how to actually get to Robin.

items.srcdoc:
Portal

Access Robin directly through the link.

Desktop

Click the AI Assistant icon on your desktop to open Robin instantly.

Microsoft Teams

Message Robin directly from Teams, just like you'd message a colleague.

Email

Email support is available, though Robin works best through the channels above.

items.title: CONTINUE
items.completeHint: Complete the content above before moving on.

items.heading: Heading
items.paragraph:
So what does this look like in real life?

Here are a few examples of what you can do with Robin starting today.

items.title: CONTINUE
items.completeHint: Complete the content above before moving on.

items.heading: Heading
items.paragraph:
You've just seen what Robin can do. Now it's your turn — and there's something in it for you.

Have one real IT conversation with Robin, and you'll earn a raffle entry for a chance to win a prize.

That's all it takes.

Robin is available 24/7 — no ticket, no queue, no waiting.

You already know how to use it. ✦

items.title: CONTINUE
items.completeHint: Complete the content above before moving on.

items.heading: Heading
items.paragraph:
Before you go - we'd love to hear from you.

Take a moment to share your first impressions of Robin and earn 2 raffle tickets.
